title: Bridge Essay: Temporal and spatial characteristics of meditation EEG.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Temporal and spatial characteristics of meditation EEG.** — Psychol Trauma. PMID: 31282721. DOI: 10.1037/tra0000488. This article discusses the importance of decisions made about the temporal and spatial characteristics of EEG during recording and analysis of meditation practices. Arecent meta-analysis averaged EEG in the alpha1 and alpha2 bands to characterize mindfulness practices. This ignored known differences in cognitive processing associated with these two bands, and so confounded their conclusion about brain patterns during mindfulness. notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 8 (Formless/Absorption). Evaluation: Excellent (score=10.5)
